events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the submitted package lacks the quantity takeoff needed to establish total scope, the checkpoint can't be scored for percent complete or pass/fail — I marked it `needs_more_info` with medium risk, no defects found in the photos themselves, and corrective actions focused on obtaining the takeoff before re-scoring.
